title: Annual Harvest, Seacliff
snippet: We were really fortunate and had a perfect weather window for the inaugural Seacliff harvest.

title: Last Weeding Day Before Harvest
snippet: A great turn out of helpers to do the last tidy of the willow beds before harvest.

title: February Weeding Day
snippet: A lovely warm day for cutting grass and pulling out weeds.

title: Weeding the Willow Beds
snippet: We had a great afternoon today weeding the new willow beds.
